query:
INSERT INTO invoices (
            invoice_date, branch_id, discount, discount_unit,
            payment_status, amount_paid, total_price,
            advance_amount, advance_payment_type
        )
        VALUES ($1, $2, $3::float8, $4, $5, $6::float8, $7::float8, $6::float8, $8)
        RETURNING id
